title: CAU Imphal Teaching and Non Teaching Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 35 Posts
post_name: Dean, Director of Research, Registrar, Senior Computer Operator/Programmer, Professor, Associate Professor, Assistant Professor
short_info: Central Agricultural University, Imphal (CAU Imphal) Various Posts Notification 2026 has been released on 08-05-2026 on the official website of Central Agricultural University, Imphal . A total of 35 vacancies have been announced through the CAU Imphal Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Candidates with Ph.D., Master’s Degree with minimum 55% marks, NET/SLET/SET or equivalent qualification along with relevant teaching, research, or administrative experience are eligible to apply for these Various Posts vacancies. The online application process for CAU Imphal Various Posts Recruitment 2026 has star

age_limit.age_details: Max 40 years for Assistant Professor, below 60 for Dean/Director, below 57 for Registrar, 35 for Sr. Computer Operator. Age relaxation as per Govt. of India norms.
age_limit.details: Maximum age limit is 40 years for Assistant Professor. Maximum age limit is below 60 years for Dean/Director. Maximum age limit is below 57 years for Registrar. Maximum age limit is 35 years for Sr. Computer Operator. Age relaxation as per Government of India norms.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D., Master’s Degree with minimum 55% marks, NET/SLET/SET or equivalent, 10-15 years teaching/research/administrative experience
qualification.details: Dean, College of Horticulture, Bermiok, South Sikkim: Ph.D. + 15 years experience including 5 years as Professor or equivalent + administrative experience. Director of Research, CAU Hqrs, Imphal: Ph.D. + 15 years experience including 5 years as Professor or equivalent + research/extension experience. Registrar, CAU Hqrs, Imphal: Master’s with 55% + 15 years administrative experience including 8 years as Deputy Registrar or equivalent. Senior Computer Operator/Programmer: MCA/M.Sc. (CS/IT) or B.E./B.Tech. (CS/ECE) + 3 years experience in programming/University Information System. Professor (Various Disciplines): Ph.D. + 10 years experience (including as Associate Professor) + 10 publications with high NAAS rating. Associate Professor (Various Disciplines): Ph.D. + 8 years experience + good published work. Assistant Professor (Livestock Production Management): Master’s with 55% + NET/Ph.D. + publications.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Dean, College of Horticulture, Bermiok, South Sikkim
Director of Research, CAU Hqrs, Imphal

selection_process: Shortlisting based on academic and career performance Presentation/Seminar Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the CAU Imphal Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 10-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CAU Imphal to complete the application.
